compiled_state.title: As a DSO plugin developer, I can look up known operational issues by keyword during debugging
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Create `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` populated with 10 incident entries covering the most frequently encountered operational friction points during standard DSO workflows.
**Why**: Agents currently rediscover the same workarounds every session, wasting cycles on problems that have known fixes. A searchable incident log gives agents immediate access to verified solutions.
**Scope**:
- IN: Creating `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` with 10 named incidents (tool timeout ceiling/exit 144, path confusion in worktrees, broad test commands killed by timeout, worktree venv/command-not-found, review gate blocks sub-agent commits, sub-agent nesting causes tool-result errors, hook failure cascades, ticket index merge conflicts, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound in parallel execution, cascading failure runaway), incident format with ID/keywords/symptom/root-cause/detection/fix, grep-based smoke test script
- OUT: Generic template for host projects (Story B), CLAUDE.md changes (Story C), onboarding pipeline fixes (Story B)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` exists with incident entries for all 10 named topics
  ← Satisfies: "`.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` exists with incident entries covering these 10 topics"
- When this story is complete, each entry has ID, keywords, symptom, root cause, detection, and fix sections
  ← Satisfies: "Each issue follows the incident format (ID, keywords, symptom, root cause, detection, fix)"
- When this story is complete, a grep-based smoke test confirms all 10 keywords return matching entries with fix sections
  ← Satisfies: "A grep-based smoke test confirms that searching KNOWN-ISSUES.md for each of the 10 incident keywords returns a matching incident entry with a fix section"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Smoke test script needed to verify keyword searchability of all 10 incidents
- [Maintainability] Keep incident format synchronized with the generic template (Story B)
